heading: util
body:
Atlas Functions support the [util](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/util.html) module with the following **exceptions**:

- Atlas Functions do **not** support [util.TextEncoder](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/util.html#util_class_util_textencoder)

- Atlas Functions do **not** support [util.TextDecoder](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/util.html#util_class_util_textdecoder)
